title: euphorbia theriaca
intro: Euphorbia theriaca, also known as the cantharides plant or Spanish jewel flower, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Euphorbia theriaca has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Euphorbia theriaca include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Euphorbia theriaca can be found in the form of tinctures, salves, and ointments, which are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
